name: forgewright
description: Adaptive AI pipeline orchestrator with 47 specialized skills and 19 execution modes. Covers the full software lifecycle — from greenfield builds, features, code review, testing, hardening, deployment, UI/UX design, mobile, to game development (Unity/Unreal/Godot/Roblox), XR, data engineering, MLOps, marketing, and business analysis. Smart routing with parallel execution via git worktrees.
